# GitHub repository profile

Set these under **Settings → General** (description, website) and **About** → ⚙️ (topics).

## Description (About → Description)

Welsh Rugby Club Guide — cross-platform fixtures, competitions, and clubs. Expo, React Native, Supabase. Companion to welshrugbyclubguide.com.

## Website

https://welshrugbyclubguide.com

## Topics (add each topic in About)

Suggested: `expo`, `expo-router`, `react-native`, `react-native-web`, `typescript`, `supabase`, `postgresql`, `rugby`, `wales`, `fixtures`, `playwright`, `netlify`, `mobile-app`

## Releases

Optional: enable **Releases** in About when you tag versions.
